input.cmd: /bin/zsh -lc "docker exec sreft-postgres psql -U postgres -d postgres -c \"select pid, usename, application_name, client_addr, state, wait_event_type, wait_event, now()-query_start as age, left(query,120) as query from pg_stat_activity where datname='postgres' order by query_start nulls last;\""

/bin/zsh -lc "docker exec sreft-postgres psql -U postgres -d postgres -c \"select state, wait_event_type, wait_event, count(*) from pg_stat_activity where datname='postgres' group by 1,2,3 order by count(*) desc;\""

/bin/zsh -lc "sleep 5; docker exec sreft-postgres psql -U postgres -d postgres -c \"select pid, state, wait_event_type, wait_event, now()-query_start as age, left(query,80) as query from pg_stat_activity where datname='postgres' order by query_start nulls last;\""
